media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil

characters.name: Lucy Morningstar
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Berserk Button: Lucy loses it anytime Satan tries to kill her boyfriends, especially in the pilot.Claiming that Lucy wears a size 10/12 will also irritate her and lead to a long conversation about how she’sclearly a size six. Claiming that Lucy wears a size 10/12 will also irritate her and lead to a long conversation about how she’sclearly a size six. Fiery Redhead: Downplayed. She has bright red hair due to her status as the Antichrist and she gets easily annoyed. Missing Mom: Outside of her speaking in a flashback scene in the pilot, Lucy's mom is never seen or mentioned. Nightmare Face: After figuring out Satan’s plans to burn down the Armageddon nightclub with DJ Jesus in it, Lucy’s face briefly distorts twice as she runs to get DJ Jesus out of the club before it catches fire.

characters.name: Satan
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Beard of Evil: Satan sports one of these, and he's... well...Satan. According to "Satan's School For Girls", he didn't have one in the 1970's. Big Red Devil: Like most portrayals of the Devil, Satan had bright red skin, giant horns, and is taller than most of the characters. Devil in Plain Sight: A very literal example, despite having red skin and giant horns, nobody seems to notice that Satan is the devil. Granted, he’s not as evil as most depictions portray him. Paper-Thin Disguise: His therapist disguise in “Dreamster” doesn’t do much to hide his identity.Depending on how it’s interpreted, the Bill Cosby sweaters he wears don’t do much to hide his identity either. Depending on how it’s interpreted, the Bill Cosby sweaters he wears don’t do much to hide his identity either.

characters.name: DJ Jesus
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Good Is Not Nice: While Heisthe second coming of Jesus Christ, He tends to be a jerk, and will go out partying with girls despite being in a relationship with Lucy. Jesus Was Way Cool: As a DJ and an escape artist that can perform miracles, DJ Jesus is a pretty cool guy. Pals with Jesus: He gets into a relationship with Lucy, and he’s on (somewhat) good terms with Satan. Second Coming: The pilot confirms that He is the second coming of Jesus Christ. Why Did It Have to Be Snakes?: Jesus is revealed to be claustrophobic in "Dreamster".Satan uses this to try and kill him in his sleep.

characters.name: Becky
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Bald of Evil: Downplayed. She has no hair on the top of her head due to being a skeleton, but she’s the most serious about following Satan’s plans to take over the world. Friendly Skeleton: Downplayed. While she isn’t overly friendly to anyone, she’s not scary or rude.

characters.name: Giuseppe Cantalupi
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Big Ol' Eyebrows: His eyebrows are so thick that they obscure his eyes. Big, Thin, Short Trio: The big to Benetti’s thin and Sister Mary’s short.

characters.name: Benetti
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Hogging the Bathroom: Thanks to how long it takes for him to use the bathroom, Benetton accidentally misses a package delivery in “Dildo Factory”. According to Sister Mary, he spends most of his bathroom time readingUsmagazines.

characters.name: Sister Mary
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: A Day in the Limelight: "Satan's School For Girls" goes deeper into her backstory, revealing that she was bullied for her thick body hair in an all girls Catholic school,and how Satan convinced her to electrocute all the other girls for bullying her. Good Is Not Nice: Despite being a nun, Sister Mary won't hesitate to kill or seriously harm anyone that she believes is in her way or hiding information. Grumpy Old Woman: Sister Mary rarely seems happy. Nun Too Holy: Outside of wearing a nun uniform, Sister Mary actsnothinglike a nun, with herHair-Trigger Temperand her violent tendencies.

characters.name: Senator Whitehead
characters.media_title: Lucy, the Daughter of the Devil
characters.description: Early Installment Character-Design Difference: His monster form in the pilot had him roughly the same size as his human form with big eyes and tentacles protruding from his head that shot dark blue goop, as opposed to the 50 foot tall hairless rabbit-like monster he would resemble in theSeries Finale. Hulking Out: Senator Whitehead will transform into a monster if he gets pissed off enough.
